title: Tata Consultancy Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Tata Consultancy Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
